title: Game Ayanami Raising Project Comparison of Versions
display_title: Game Ayanami Raising Project Comparison of Versions
wikitext:
[]: [Game] Ayanami Raising Project - Comparison of Versions             Quote Post by xPearse » Tue Jul 21, 2015 9:28 am Hi there. I actually forgot to post this here when I did it, but it's here now, I guess. Anyhow, not too long ago I made a comparison of the different platform version of Ayanami Raising Project which includes PC, Dreamcast, PS2, and NDS, detailing as you can guess the differences (with pictures). That said, I'll just be dumping my blog/tumblr post of it here so excuse me for my choice of words here and there, and my dribble. Censor it if need be. I don't mind. Also, I'm a very sarcastic person so please try not to take anything that I bring up seriously or to heart. Lastly, it is kinda long so please bear with me. Now, let's begin. Comparison of Versions Hmm, my bad for not doing this when I should have. That said, here’s a little version comparison of Neon Genesis Evangelion: Ayanami Raising Project. Now, where should I start. I’ll begin with gameplay to build up some text before I post pics. Also, take note when I use ARP (Ayanami Raising Project - PC & Dreamcast) and ASP (Asuka supplement Project - PS2 & NDS), otherwise you might get confused. Gameplay For the most part, gameplay remains the same, but there are some differences. The gameplay in the original PC release was broken, buggy and very unbalanced (especially Rei’s love meter) for the most part, so much that Rei sees Shinji when she dies (I’ve mentioned this before if anyone remembers) even though you as 2nd Lieutenant has a higher love meter (or whatever the fuck you want to call it) than him. I mean, if something like that which is a crucial part in the game is broken, then get out. Leave. And come back when you fucking fix things. No, let me say this, they couldn’t be that dumb, that was probably intentional knowing how Anno loves to torture Reifags and see them suffer. 3.33 anyone? Yeah, that’s what’s really going on here. I knew it all fucking along. Anyhow, they did put out a patch, which didn’t really fix anything because I still got that same fucking bug. I take it back, they are that dumb. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: [Game] Ayanami Raising Project - Comparison of Versions             Quote Post by Crazy Packers Fan » Sun Oct 30, 2016 11:42 pm How about the endings? I heard (maybe it was from you, I can't remember) that certain endings got removed from the DS version. Do you know which endings are specific to each version?

[]: Re: [Game] Ayanami Raising Project - Comparison of Versions             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Thu Nov 24, 2016 5:51 am I've been wondering about this game. I hear it's absolutely batshit crazy, with Rei getting the opportunity to become a baker, a bride, a painter, a fitness instructor, and, umm...a dominatrix? (Good lord, Rei would be the worst dominatrix ever. "Punish me!" "If I'm ordered to, I will. What is considered unpleasant?") Good job on translating it, I need to play it now. (Along with GOS, which I need to re-download after I sadly lost it due to a PC wipe). IIRC

I heard (maybe it was from you, I can't remember) that certain endings got removed from the DS version. Do you know which endings are specific to each version?

[]: Re: [Game] Ayanami Raising Project - Comparison of Versions             Quote Post by Markal » Mon Jan 09, 2017 3:51 pm @xPearse: I sat down, patched and played the game (Through both routes), and I thoroughly appreciate the effort you put into allowing us non-Japanese-speaking folks to enjoy this amusing jaunt into meddling with Rei/Asuka's lives. Bravo! SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: [Game] Ayanami Raising Project - Comparison of Versions             Quote Post by niku » Sat Jul 27, 2019 3:53 am in nds: very hard to made Rei become otaku & wear bunny suit & gurren lagann outfit, but ib Asuka maybe not really hard to made Asuka become otaku & wear gurren lagann yoko cosplay, i spent 23.000 yen buy doujin in 8/13 comiket event,but Rei not wearing negane... can help me mister?

[]: Re: [Game] Ayanami Raising Project - Comparison of Versions             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Jul 27, 2019 10:06 am ...what

[]: Re: [Game] Ayanami Raising Project - Comparison of Versions             Quote Post by Crazy Packers Fan » Sat Dec 14, 2019 2:08 pm Did anyone else ever play this and finish? I've played the English translated version, but I have only been able to get the same ending every single time (the fast food ending). I'd like to know if it's even possible to get any other ending. After all, I used a cheat code to max out Rei's attributes, so ending up with her as an incompetent fast food employee just doesn't make sense. If by chance you are able to get a different ending, screenshot all the dialogue from the ending so we can see what happens in it. I did that for the fast food ending; it's rather depressing that I raised Rei into an employee who gets orders wrong three times per day.
